# Katanas
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Katanas&prop=wikitext

The katana is the main weapon of the ninja. It is focused on average-high dps at medium range.

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = RayKatana.png
| link = Ray Katana
| text = Ray Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SullenBlade.png
| link = Sullen Blade
| text = Sullen Blade
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = DokuNoKen.png
| link = Doku No Ken
| text = Doku No Ken
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = VoidBlade.png
| link = Void Blade
| text = Void Blade
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlack
| file = UselessKatana.png
| link = Useless Katana
| text = Useless Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Windcutter.png
| link = Windcutter
| text = Windcutter
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = StemOfTheBrain.png
| link = Stem of the Brain
| text = Stem of the Brain
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Asura.png
| link = Asura
| text = Asura
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ArbitersWrath.png
| link = Arbiters Wrath
| text = Arbiters Wrath
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = MoltenKatana.png
| link = Molten Katana
| text = Molten Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = AcidKatana.png
| link = Acid Katana
| text = Acid Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = DoomKatana.png
| link = Doom Katana
| text = Doom Katana
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = BrokenBranch.png
| link = Broken Branch
| text = Broken Branch
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DiamondBladedKatana.png
| link = Diamond Bladed Katana
| text = Diamond Bladed Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CorruptedCleaver.png
| link = Corrupted Cleaver
| text = Corrupted Cleaver
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Salju.png
| link = Salju
| text = Salju
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HimurasKatana.png
| link = Himura's Katana
| text = Himura's Katana
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = StardustCutter.png
| link = Stardust Cutter
| text = Stardust Cutter
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Muramasa.png
| link = Muramasa
| text = Muramasa
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Masamune.png
| link = Masamune
| text = Masamune
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Sadamune.png
| link = Sadamune
| text = Sadamune
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = RustyKatana.png
| link = Rusty Katana
| text = Rusty Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = KendoStick.png
| link = Kendo Stick
| text = Kendo Stick
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = PlainKatana.png
| link = Plain Katana
| text = Plain Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ThunderKatana.png
| link = Thunder Katana
| text = Thunder Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = LineKutterKatana.png
| link = Line Kutter Katana
| text = Line Kutter Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = NightEdge.png
| link = Night Edge
| text = Night Edge
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SkyEdge.png
| link = Sky Edge
| text = Sky Edge
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = BusterKatana.png
| link = Buster Katana
| text = Buster Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = DemonEdge.png
| link = Demon Edge
| text = Demon Edge
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = JewelEyeKatana.png
| link = Jewel Eye Katana
| text = Jewel Eye Katana
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Ichimonji.png
| link = Ichimonji
| text = Ichimonji
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Kusanagi.png
| link = Kusanagi
| text = Kusanagi
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
